$comment: Machine-readable audit manifest for the FoAR paper figure pipeline (NEXT_RUN_10 / 'cake' run). One record per figure: generating script + function, exact input files with roles, and output path. Hashes are sha256. Paths are relative to the engine root FoAR/engine/ (this file lives at FoAR/engine/audit/foar_figures/MANIFEST.json, so engine root = ../../ from here). See RUNBOOK.md for commands and PROVENANCE.md for data lineage.
captured_by: audit scaffolding pass (read-only; no scripts run)
git_repo: FoAR/ is a git repository; power_to_form/ is not. This audit lives inside the versioned FoAR tree, beside the code and the paper it documents.
run_label: NEXT_RUN_10 (cake), 8 jiedao x (current + 5 scenarios) x modes A/B
hash_volatility_warning: figs_nr10*.py were being edited by concurrent agents at capture time (de-editorialization pass). figs_nr10_schematic.py changed under observation (b1ac40e5 -> 00c69bc1) and F5/F6 regenerated at 23:39. Treat the three figs_nr10*.py hashes as a SNAPSHOT to diff against, not a frozen baseline. See RUNBOOK 'SCRIPT SYNC PENDING'. RESOLVED 2026-07-14: all three figure scripts are now pinned to their published versions (see scripts_snapshot).

figs_nr10_schematic.py.status: SYNCED 2026-07-14 (refresh pass): re-pinned to commit 3e35bbc 'Figs 1-2 restyled as academic monochrome line art'. The 2026-07-14 snapshot was one commit stale (c0ad6595) while the PUBLISHED Fig. 1 and Fig. 2 are the restyled ones; scripts_snapshot/ and this hash now pin the published version.

helpers.$comment: Shared modules imported by the figure scripts. A change here changes the figures even if the figure scripts do not change.

upstream_producers.$comment: The figure scripts read only files already on disk. These scripts produced those files and must be run first if the artefacts are absent. run_cake.py + verify_cake.py (the FROZEN five) are the baseline; the *_all / *_nr10 runners extend to eight sites and never touch the frozen files.

cake_viewers.py.note: needs headless chromium (playwright); SwiftShader software WebGL so PNGs are reproducible without a GPU

frozen_data_inputs.$comment: Small text artefacts hashed so the exact run behind the published figures is pinned. Re-running the figure scripts against these exact files must reproduce the figures.

bulk_inputs_not_hashed.$comment: Large binaries deliberately NOT copied or hashed individually (per the non-duplication rule). Recorded by glob + count + total size only.

data/<slug>/buildings.parquet.role: per-site clipped footprints + heights + stakeholder, EPSG:32651; via pf_common.load_buildings

out/cake_figs/shot_*.png.role: agent-3d Three.js massing/skyline screenshots (8 sites x 5 configs x 2 views); cropped into F1/F2/F4

out/cake/ledger_*.csv.role: per-building take/rebuild ledgers; F5 reads ledger_laoximen_capital_deepen_B.csv

out/cake/skyline_*.json.role: per-scenario [bid, height_m, holder]; consumed by cake_viewers.py, not by the figure scripts

figures.name: Site atlas: eight fabrics, one ruler

inputs.role: per-site current fingerprint (9 axes), shares_gfa, coverage, V_total
figure-ground plan (8 sites), coloured by holder
fingerprints, FAR delta, acquired_n, target_met, share_reached per scenario

figures.name: The substrate remembers: fingerprints + Spearman rank preservation

inputs.role: ALL 8 axes x 5 states; Spearman computed in-script (no external stats file)

figures.name: Morphological reachability: 5x5 target grid + cross-case map

inputs.role: 5x5 developer x state target grid, per site (all 8 for F4b; pengpu/zhangjiang/lujiazui for the per-site sheets)
true easting per building for the 2D height-profile thumbnails

figures.name: The tool skeleton: read -> map -> transform -> read-back, swappable lens

inputs.role: Laoximen fingerprints/shares/headline numbers printed on the loop
per-building h_after under the installed (developer-led) lens
923 real footprints for the read/read-back cells (EPSG:32651)

figures.name: Seven parameter families vs generative operationalisation (power = the empty cell)
figures.input_note: PURE SCHEMATIC. No data, no counts, no citations plotted. Reproducible from the script alone.

figures.name: PCA of the 21-column metadata vector, coloured by stakeholder

inputs.role: every building of all 8 sites into one feature table (build_table)
EULUC -> holder cascade (the reading being visualised)

figures.computed: 21-col feature vector (physical 7 + metadata 14) via cake.far_allowed/far_actual/weakness_score + measure coverage; sklearn PCA

figures.name: Same PCA embedding read three ways (weakness / EULUC family / entanglement)
Non-linear bottleneck: autoencoder + beta-VAE vs PCA, and recoverability
figures.computed: numpy autoencoder + numpy beta-VAE (beta=0.05, Adam 2e-3, tanh MLP, SEED=0); 10-NN balanced accuracy, 5-fold CV. Cached under out/cake_figs/_embed_cache/ so a re-draw does not re-train.

key_gates: frozen-five regression: every numeric leaf of metrics_cake.json reproduced from metrics_cake_all.json, max deviation 0.0
cross-case inversion: zhangjiang developer-led falls short at 0.774 of 0.80; pengpu state-led reaches only 0.063 of 0.30; zhangjiang the only developer-led failure
reachability: every unreachable cell is state-side; pengpu 20/25 worst, zhangjiang 0/25 best
envelope inert at base gamma (highest developer rebuild target < 60 m), binds at strict gamma (30 m)
aux CSV row counts + weak_first ordering-rule lift
figures/viewers/screenshots on disk: F1..F6 + E1 present >20KB, 8 viewers, 80 shots
verification.companion: verify_cake.py covers the FROZEN five only; verify_cake_nr10.py is the eight-site superset.

embed_cache_frozen.$comment: Canonical FROZEN E-series (E1-E3) trained embeddings. Live producer path out/cake_figs/_embed_cache/ is git-ignored (.gitignore: engine/out/cake_figs/_embed_cache/); THIS tracked copy is the durable one. numpy AE/VAE, seed 0, 450 epochs, numpy 2.0.2. Restore before re-running: cp audit/foar_figures/embed_cache_frozen/*.npy audit/foar_figures/embed_cache_frozen/*.json out/cake_figs/_embed_cache/ ; python3 figs_nr10_embed.py all (loads, does not retrain). Balanced-accuracy rows in E_embed_stats.json derive from these: PCA-2D 0.5720907023642345, AE-2D 0.8884726455700068, VAE-2D 0.9044345480251382, full-D 0.8849834640296838. Bit-stable re-verified 2026-07-14 (E_embed_stats.json sha256 a23c27f5c0929a0e905a0bbbc4dafd8899f8a837429f0df76d51118a7dd1ad21 unchanged). See embed_cache_frozen/README.md.

scripts_snapshot.note: final de-editorialized+title-less versions, copies in scripts_snapshot/. figs_nr10_schematic.py was refreshed on 2026-07-14 from c0ad6595 to 45b0fbe2: the earlier snapshot predated commit 3e35bbc (monochrome line-art restyle of Fig. 1-2), so it did not pin the published figures. figs_nr10.py and figs_nr10_embed.py were already current.
